programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel is worried about her sister's flirtation with Ross; sickly Monica is well enough to seduce Chandler; Joey uses free food to lure women to date him.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler's anniversary gift to Monica is really one an ex-girlfriend gave him; Joey hires a look-alike; Ross tries to teach martial arts to Rachel.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: Dave is eager to take on a bigger role in the community and prove himself to Calvin; Calvin's reaction makes it clear that, while the relationship between the two families has grown, the friendship between Calvin and Dave needs more time.

programme.sub-title: Driven to Tears; Rule of Dumb
programme.desc: Patrick gets his license and wins a car; a document reveals that Patrick is next in line to become a king.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Squirrels; Pups Save a Roo
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol is on a roll when squirrels stash acorns in Alex's treehouse, causing it to fall onto Daring Danny's skateboard; a switcheroo situation develops when a joey is separated from its mother.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Get Your Goat; Pups Save the Crop Circles
programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin, Francois, observe a pair of mountain goats when a sudden avalanche strikes; Farmer Al finds mysterious crop circles in his corn field, so he calls on the "Paw Patrol" to find out who is making them.

programme.sub-title: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Hum-Dino

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Flamingo Dancer; Pups Save a Mayor and Her Mini

programme.sub-title: The Big Announcement; Being Babies; Mr. Cat's Cafe; Folk Music Band; Staying up Late

programme.title: Rubble & Crew

programme.desc: Rubble moves with his family of construction pups to the nearby town of Builder Cove where they live, play, and build whatever the community needs.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and his best friend Daisy cheerfully navigate life with boundless enthusiasm and comical misunderstandings due to his instinctive crocodile logic.

programme.desc: When the pups and Cap'n Turbot camp out under a magical moon, they are transformed into mer-pups so they can perform an underwater rescue.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Sandy leads the scouts through space for scientific exploration, where SpongeBob finds life exists in the form of a Krabby Patty, Sandy studies the moon's gravitational effect on nuts, and Squidward goes to the dark side.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward and Mr. Krabs are locked in the freezer during the Krusty Krab's anniversary celebration.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: Transformania
programme.desc: Van Helsing's mysterious new invention transforms Drac and his pals into humans, and Johnny into a monster. With their new mismatched bodies, Drac and the pack must find a way to switch themselves back before their transformations become permanent.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Can-do koala Buster Moon and his all-star cast of animal performers prepare to launch a dazzling stage extravaganza in the glittering entertainment capital of the world. There's just one hitch, he has to find and persuade the world's most reclusive rock star to join them. What begins as Buster's dream of big-time success soon becomes an emotional reminder of the power of music to heal even the most broken heart.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
